title: Create and Exploration thing
description:
Me and my friends wanted to make a modpack with a bunch of create but we also wanted some adventure and danger added so i made this thing. 

Hope you enjoy!
body:
Its Basically a bunch of create addons, dungeons, mobs and biomes to explore.

Hope you enjoy!

The modpack has shaders from:
[https://www.complementary.dev/shaders/](https://www.complementary.dev/shaders/)

!!!Make sure to set your allocated memory to over 8GB!!!
